programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Drac's pack is back for a brand new adventure! And this time with a new little addition - Drac's half-human and half-vampire grandson.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita, and Little Rock move to the American heartland as they face off against evolved zombies, fellow survivors, and the growing pains of the snarky makeshift family.

programme.title: Anacondas: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: Searching feral jungles for orchids which contain youth serum scientists find anacondas who've eaten them - bigger smarter more lethal than ever.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: The film introduces Brooklyn teen Miles Morales, and the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A CIA agent goes on the run after a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: An unconventional superhero's heroics never fail to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake until a PR executive comes along.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A chauvinist puts a romantically challenged producer through a series of outrageous tests to prove his theories about relationships.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels' quest to find two rings leads them to a Mongolian outpost where they uncover a dark secret.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A young navy lawyer investigates the death of two marines. He must battle the commanding officer of the base who doesn't want the whole story told.

programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate exploits death threats, fabricated for publicity, to kill his manager.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A motivational researcher blackmails to further his career, kills a man, then frames the victim's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An enraged publisher hires a gunman to kill an author who intends to sign a contract with a competitor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prodigy and his robot help investigate the murder of a professor who threatened to disgrace a colleague's scientist son.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A gospel singer kills his evangelist wife when she denies him more money and threatens blackmail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A man murders his wife and has a friend cover up the act with a burglary, only to have the friend blackmail him into doing the same favor in return.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo keeps a close watch on a physical-fitness fanatic suspected of murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prominent photographer hatches a scheme to cover up his wife's murder with a phony kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A military-academy commandant murders to protect his career and prevent his school's conversion to a coed junior college.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo's Mexico cruise is disrupted when an automobile executive kills his blackmailing lover, the ship's singer, then frames a musician.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: After killing his mother-in-law, an electronics magnate's alibi is a video security system.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (George Hamilton) romances a wealthy patient (Lesley Ann Warren) then uses her in his alibi after killing her husband (Stephen Elliott).

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired actress/dancer stages her wealthy husband's suicide after he refuses to finance her Broadway comeback.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A foreign dignitary murders his rival then disguises the crime as part of a robbery blamed on college protesters.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cunning advertising consultant leading a double life as a spy tries to cover up the details of a homicide.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer , a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew , whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defence lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: A screwy professor's experiments with a gorgeous model attract the attentions of a gangster and a handsome millionaire.

programme.title: Island of Lost Souls
programme.desc: White-suited Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton) herds his bestial mutants and plots to mate his panther-woman with a visitor (Richard Arlen).","large":"In this adaptation of H.G. Wells' novel "The Island of Doctor Moreau," Edward Parker (Richard Arlen) is shipwrecked on a remote island presided over by the mysterious Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton). Edward discovers his host is conducting genetic experiments, and presiding over a race of half-human, half-animal hybrids, including the alluring Panther Woman and the sage Sayer of the Law (Bela Lugosi). The island has become its own society, with Moreau as its god.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Based on a Ray Bradbury short story about an astronomer's encounter with extraterrestrials in the Arizona desert.","large":"While looking through his telescope one night, John Putnam (Richard Carlson) sees what at first appears to be a meteor shower -- but it is actually a crash-landing alien spaceship! After investigating the crater from the impact, John informs the town sheriff (Charles Drake), and receives nothing but ridicule. Even his fiancée, Ellen (Barbara Rush), is skeptical. All that changes when the townsfolk start disappearing, and are replaced by eerie alien duplicates.

programme.title: Kiss of the Vampire
programme.desc: A professor (Clifford Evans) in black rescues stranded 1910 newlyweds from a Bavarian doctor's (Noel Willman) vampire villa.

programme.title: The Mad Doctor of Market Street
programme.desc: A fugitive doctor (Lionel Atwill) tries to raise the dead for South Sea Islanders.

programme.title: The Mad Ghoul
programme.desc: A mad scientist (George Zucco) turns his assistant (David Bruce) into a zombie as part of a plan to steal his assistant's lover (Evelyn Ankers).

programme.title: Man-Made Monster
programme.desc: A mad scientist (Lionel Atwill) makes an electric man (Lon Chaney Jr.) who glows and must wear a rubber suit.

programme.title: The Monster and the Girl
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates a monster when he transplants the brain of an executed murderer into the body of an ape.

programme.title: Monster on the Campus
programme.desc: A professor turns into a Neanderthal killer after injecting himself with the blood of an ancient fish.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.","large":"A team of British archaeologists led by Sir Joseph Whemple discover the mummified remains of the ancient Egyptian prince Imhotep, along with the legendary scroll of Thoth. When one of the archaeologists recites the scroll aloud, Imhotep returns to life, but escapes. Several years later, Imhotep has taken on the guise of a wealthy man, as he searches Egypt for his lost love, who he believes has been reincarnated as the lovely Helen Grosvenor.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: A mummy (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the Louisiana bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists (Dick Foran, Wallace Ford) defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.","large":"In Cairo, archaeologist Steve Banning (Dick Foran) unearths a vase that he believes could lead him to the ancient tomb of Princess Ananka. Unknown to Steve, his colleague, Professor Andoheb (George Zucco), is also the High Priest of Karnac who holds the secrets of Karas, a mummy who guards Ananka's tomb. Upon receiving funds from magician Solvani (Cecil Kellaway) and his daughter, Marta (Peggy Moran), Steve and the Solvanis embark on an expedition to the grave site, where Karas awaits.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: Old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls mummy (Lon Chaney) at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) comes out of a lake in his coffin and makes a Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: Tremors 3: Back to Perfection
programme.desc: Mutated graboids return to feast on the residents of Perfection, threatening its new status as a tourist attraction.","large":"Legendary monster-killer Burt Gummer (Michael Gross) has returned to Perfection, Nev., scene of the original attacks by the worm creatures with razor teeth known as graboids. Sure enough, the creatures attack again, only now they're split into graboids, shriekers and a new mutation known as ass-blasters, which are propelled into flight by combustible flatulence. It's up to Burt, Jack Sawyer (Matthew Seth Wilson) and other locals to save their town from destruction.

programme.title: Tremors 4: The Legend Begins
programme.desc: A man (Michael Gross) hires a mercenary to destroy gigantic worms that are terrorizing a mining town in the 1800s.","large":"Prim East Coast dandy Hiram Gummer (Michael Gross) arrives in the town of Rejection, Nev., to investigate a series of strange deaths at the silver mine he owns. He receives help from local innkeeper Christine Lord (Sara Botsford) and miner Juan Padilla (Brent Roam). But, when it turns out that gigantic killer worms that burrow underground are responsible for the miners' deaths, Hiram decides he'd better call in expert gunslinger Black Hand Kelly (Billy Drago) to save the day.

programme.title: Tremors 5: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Survivalist Burt Gummer (Michael Gross) and his new sidekick Travis (Jamie Kennedy) are hired to track down an ass-blaster terrorizing South Africa. As they engage in battles with the aggressive creatures, they discover an even more lethal creature.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love.","large":"Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love. Among these individuals is David, the handsome, newly elected British prime minister who falls for a junior staffer. Sarah is a graphic designer whose devotion to her mentally ill brother complicates her love life. Harry, a married man, is tempted by his attractive new secretary.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: An English tennis player (Paul Bettany) reinvigorates his game after finding romance with an American counterpart (Kirsten Dunst).","large":"Frustrated at his own failures and disillusioned with professional sports, tennis player Peter Colt (Paul Bettany) resolves to retire from competition and become an instructor at an exclusive private club. But when Colt receives a surprise wild-card berth in Wimbledon, he can't help but enter the tournament. Soon, Colt meets Lizzie Bradbury (Kirsten Dunst), a beautiful American tennis player with an upcoming match of her own, and finds the inspiration he hopes will turn his luck around.

programme.title: Miss Pettigrew Lives for a Day
programme.desc: A middle-aged British governess (Frances McDormand) gets a taste of the glamorous life when she takes a job as the caretaker of an American celebrity (Amy Adams).","large":"It's 1939 and governess Guinevere Pettigrew finds herself out of work and on the bread line. Middle-aged and running out of options, Miss Pettigrew takes an uncharacteristic gamble when, after being refused work at an employment agency, she steals the details of a juicy assignment and pursues the job herself.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter reunites with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.","large":"In 1979 young Donna, Tanya and Rosie graduate from Oxford University -- leaving Donna free to embark on a series of adventures throughout Europe. On her journeys, she makes the acquaintances of Harry, Bill and Sam -- the latter whom she falls in love with, but he's also the man who breaks her heart. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter, Sophie, dreams of renovating a taverna while reuniting with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: A broke producer (Steve Martin) hires a nerd (Eddie Murphy) who looks like a famous actor and other misfits to star in his latest movie.","large":"On the verge of bankruptcy and desperate for his big break, aspiring filmmaker Bobby Bowfinger (Steve Martin) concocts a crazy plan to make his ultimate dream movie. Rallying a ragtag team that includes a starry-eyed ingénue (Heather Graham), a has-been diva (Christine Baranski) and a film studio gofer (Jamie Kennedy), he sets out to shoot a blockbuster featuring the biggest star in Hollywood, Kit Ramsey (Eddie Murphy) -- only without letting Ramsey know he's in the picture.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: A bumbling British agent (Rowan Atkinson) tries to find a French billionaire (John Malkovich) who has stolen the crown jewels.","large":"Pascal Sauvage (John Malkovich), a villain intent on stealing Britain's Crown Jewels, has murdered the country's top undercover agents, and mediocre spy Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) is ordered to prevent further mayhem. But even with help from quick-thinking sidekick Bough (Ben Miller), the goofy agent lands himself in one precarious situation after another. Only when he meets up with Interpol crime-fighter Lorna Campbell (Natalie Imbruglia) is Johnny able to chip away at Pascal's defenses.

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: The bumbling secret agent (Rowan Atkinson) uses his questionable combat skills and high-tech gadgets to protect a Chinese leader from a band of assassins.","large":"After a disastrous mission in Mozambique, British agent Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) has retreated to a Tibetan monastery to try to forget his shame. But when he receives an urgent call from MI-7 to lead a mission that only he can handle, English is back in action. Using his questionable combat skills and an assortment of high-tech gadgets, English, along with his new partner, Agent Tucker (Daniel Kaluuya), must foil a plot to kill the Chinese premier.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: An eccentric, accident-prone British art caretaker (Rowan Atkinson) wreaks havoc at the U.S. unveiling of "Whistler's Mother."","large":"At the Royal National Gallery in London, the bumbling Mr. Bean (Rowan Atkinson) is a guard with good intentions who always seems to destroy anything he touches. Unless, of course, he's sleeping on the job. With the chairman (John Mills) blocking Bean's firing, the board decides to send him to a Los Angeles art gallery under false credentials. When Bean arrives, his chaos-causing ways are as sharp as ever, and curator David Langley (Peter MacNicol) has the unenviable task of keeping Bean in line.

programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: The teenage children of a lesbian couple (Julianne Moore, Annette Bening) seek out their biological father (Mark Ruffalo) and make him a part of their lives.","large":"Lesbian couple Jules (Julianne Moore) and Nic (Annette Bening) have been together for almost 20 years and have two teenage offspring named Joni and Laser, who were conceived via artificial insemination. Unbeknown to their mothers, Joni and Laser seek out their biological father, a restaurateur named Paul (Mark Ruffalo). Complications arise when the teens bond with Paul and invite him into their lives.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: A man (Ben Stiller) fears the worst when he accompanies his fiancée's uptight father (Robert De Niro) and mother to meet his free-spirited mom and dad (Dustin Hoffman).","large":"Now that Greg Focker is "in" with his soon-to-be in-laws, Jack and Dina Byrnes, it looks like smooth sailing for him and his fiancée, Pam. But that's before Pam's parents meet Greg's parents, the Fockers. The hyper-relaxed Fockers and the tightly-wound Byrnes are woefully mismatched from the start, and no matter how hard Greg and Pam try, there is just no bringing their families together. This all adds up to a disastrously funny time of getting to know you.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: When a woman brings her boyfriend home for her sister's wedding, her father, a former CIA agent, takes an instant dislike to him.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: As two clans descend on the scene of young twins' birthday, Greg Focker's moonlighting at a pharmaceutical company threatens to derail his position of trust with Jack, his uptight father-in-law.","large":"After 10 years of marriage and two children, it seems that Greg Focker has finally earned a place in the "circle of trust" of his uptight father-in-law, Jack. However, Greg is moonlighting with a drug company, which raises Jack's suspicions. As two clans descend on the scene of the young twins' birthday party, Greg must find a way through myriad misunderstandings to prove to Jack -- once and for all -- that he is worthy of being the next family patriarch.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A young married couple is faced with a difficult problem when the husband's first wife, who was presumed dead, joins the wagon train.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Major Adams is forced to come to the rescue of a fast-talking con artist who gets himself into a situation that he can't handle.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After Flint happens on the body of an Indian killed by a soldier, the tribal chief threatens to attack if the guilty party does not confess.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A young man who is determined to avoid becoming a henpecked husband must weigh his love for an overbearing woman.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A priest tries to arrange a meeting with Sitting Bull to talk about a peace treaty.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After a run-in with a traveling prizefighter leaves a mess at the station, Jonesy becomes the man's promoter to help pay the bills at the station.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim gets a threatening letter, addressed to his late father, from a man who wants vengeance for the death of his son.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While Jess is away, Slim leases a rough section of land to a former lawman who, unbeknownst to Slim, has hired a bunch of outlaws as his ranch hands.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Wyoming Territory has become the winter battleground for the warring Sioux and Cheyenne, forcing Slim and Jess to close the ranch and relay station.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After a drought and the ending of the stage line, Slim and Jess must join a cattle drive run by a stranger who at first seems impressive, but soon their suspicions are aroused.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: After a treaty with the Apaches, Fort Chapman is targeted for closure, but in the meantime, Jim Hardie must keep the peace until civilian law can fill the void.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie takes on counterfeiters who have created fake Wells Fargo checks.

programme.desc: Hardie deals with a family of outlaws.

programme.desc: Hardie guards four beautiful women.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie helps the Army hold a fort against an Indian attack.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie investigates a small town suffering a rash of deaths, but no one provides him with answers.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie hunts for an outlaw who killed a Wells Fargo employee, but the killer is also being sought by two Apaches for killing a woman and her son.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A widow tries to rope Hardie into marriage.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie seeks help from an embittered doctor while on the trail of thieves.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: While investigating the robbery of a Wells Fargo office, Hardie witnesses the murder of its agent from the hotel across the street.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An old friend of Adams and McCullough joins the wagon train and shares the fact that he has recently discovered a gold mine in the nearby hills.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A riverboat gambler who has committed murder pretends to be a parson traveling with his children. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A man returns from the Civil War to find his home and family destroyed as the result of a feud and heads West to seek his revenge.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An old Indian asks to join the wagon train so his son can learn the ways of the white man because he believes the Indian way of life is dying.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Major Adams intervenes when a friend's niece becomes romantically involved with a gambler. Guest star: Cesar Romero. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint finds the ruins of a farmhouse which was attacked by Indians using guns, not arrows; he later finds the gunrunner who supplied them.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When a group of Scottish people join the wagon train as a protection against Indian attacks, two disparate young people fall in love.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An American Indian, his wife and baby join the wagon train when Major Adams discovers him badly beaten by bigoted white settlers.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A young Indian kidnaps his father's fiance and forces her to work as revenge against the man who treated his mother badly and caused her suicide.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A man searches for hidden gold.

programme.desc: A flirtatious Southern belle does her best to win the affections of a young Sicilian man, then rejects him in favor of another.

programme.desc: A white man who was captured by Indians, but eventually earned their respect and married his captor's sister, faces prejudice when he returns home.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Passengers of a stagecoach, forced to wait out a storm at the Sherman Ranch, all have something they are trying to hide.

programme.desc: The new stage line superintendent wants Jess fired, which causes tension on the ranch; Slim and Jess track horse thieves.

programme.desc: Hardie puts trust in newly released outlaw Bill Dowd, but will he regret it?

programme.desc: A bitter rivalry develops when a young woman joins the wagon train and two men vie for her hand in marriage.

programme.desc: In search of a doctor for an injured woman, Flint finds the town quarantined due to smallpox.

programme.desc: A newcomer says that he is really John Wilkes Booth in an effort to keep the travelers from breaking into feuding factions.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint fails to return after Seth sends him in search of water.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After a dying man (Harvey Stephens) is duped into buying swampland, Flint (Robert Horton) tracks down the swindler (Reed Hadley) who sold it to him. With Ward Bond.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Wooster, Adams and Hawks are tricked into serving on a cargo ship, while Flint travels cross-country by himself.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess unwillingly works to help T.J. Patterson track a thief who stole money from the stage line, along with the heart of Patterson's daughter.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Five years after committing murder, Frank Buckley is paroled to Slim Sherman, but there are some in town who don't want the killer in their midst.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hunt for Vernon Kane, who has robbed the bank and killed a popular deputy, but their search also leads them to a gambler and his wife, who've joined forces with the outlaw.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess join a posse hunting for three escaped gang members who attempted to rob the Wells Fargo office, killing a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess become involved in a fight between the ranchers and the homesteaders, and despite their efforts at keeping the situation under control, a rancher is murdered.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Attackers strike while Hardie attempts to deliver a golden owl to its wealthy purchaser.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim gets a promotion but is disinclined toward office work, so he decides to hunt down the outlaw Johnny Reno instead.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie pursues Butch Cassidy again, but instead of arresting the former outlaw, Hardie tries to recruit him.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie negotiates with the Pawnees to allow for a section of railroad to be built through the Black Hills.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim heads to the town of Medicine River to open a new office, where he's greeted by an employee who is the son of a Cheyenne chief Jim knew years earlier.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie's attempt to help a stranded man goes awry when he realizes that man has a $25,000 bounty on him.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie looks for a pair of outlaws known as the Rucker Brothers.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie investigates a gambler's winning streak.

programme.desc: Hardie deals with a family of outlaws.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie guards four beautiful women.

programme.desc: A boy sees his father lynched.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After Major Adams discovers a pair of outcast stowaways on the wagon train and allows them to remain, one of them is accused of murder.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Romance complicates the mission of an underground revolutionary from Ireland who sails for America to locate and kill a traitor.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An American Indian chief needs an operation after being shot, but won't accept help from the female Dr. Willoughby.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An unscrupulous frontiersman claims that, for a fee, he can lead a guilt-stricken man to his long-lost brother.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint poses as his former girlfriend's husband so she can keep her daughter.

programme.desc: The host presents a brief and quick overview of some of the most important stories and the latest developments from all over the country.

programme.title: Main Tera Dushman
programme.desc: A devoted Forest Officer and his wife confront a corrupt inspector and allies, uncovering murder, frame-ups, and a ruthless plot that threatens their lives and justice.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Sachin Tichkule is an ambitious contractor who faces opposition from everyone, both at home and at work. But he continues to struggle while his family members continue to pocket ill-gained money.

programme.title: Pyar Jhukta Nahin
programme.desc: Preeti returns to her parents' home after facing tensions in her marriage with Ajay, seeking comfort and clarity while navigating the ups and downs of her complicated relationship.

programme.title: Kohram
programme.desc: A colonel's botched hit leads to a hidden life-until an undercover major tracks him down and joins forces to bring a corrupt minister to justice.

programme.title: The Hero: Love Story Of A Spy
programme.desc: Arun, an Indian spy, is heartbroken when his love, Reshma, mysteriously vanishes. Fueled by love and vengeance, he embarks on a mission to track down her abductors and seek justice.

programme.title: Jodidar
programme.desc: Ganesh, an elephant, seeks to avenge the death of his previous master at the hands of 3 poachers. After he kills two, the third abducts Munna.

programme.title: Hum Pyar Tumhi Se Kar Baithe
programme.desc: An upset wife leaves her husband Vikas because of his illegal activities.

programme.title: Dastak
programme.desc: Sharad, mentally unstable, obsessively pursues Miss Universe Sushmita, resorting to harm to those close to her.

programme.title: Aag Se Khelenge
programme.desc: Shekhar teams up with Johnny to fight Zaka's empire. But when he discovers Ravi Saxena died months ago, everything he believed about his ally - and their mission - starts to unravel.

programme.title: Himmatwala (1983)
programme.desc: Ravi seeks justice for his father's name. Sher Singh's daughter, caught between love and loyalty, helps Ravi deceive her father, turning a family feud into a battle of hearts and honor.

programme.title: Aarzoo
programme.desc: Pooja marries Amar after Vijay's death. But when Vijay returns, her world spins again, torn between loyalty, love, and the life she's already begun to rebuild.

programme.title: Naseeb Apna Apna
programme.desc: She thought she was marrying into a new life. Instead, she walks into a home where the groom's father hides a second, secret marriage - and the truth is far from simple.

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: An honest superintendent of police, IPS Amit Kumar, is assigned to a town to reduce its crime rates. There, he has to face corrupt fellow officers and politicians while dealing with brutal criminals.

programme.title: Ram Lakhan
programme.desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

programme.title: Gunda Gardi
programme.desc: Kalicharan, a ruthless gang leader, terrorises the city. To stop his reign, Police Commissioner Karan Singh is assigned the mission to bring him down.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Ileana. Naina leaves wanderer Kalyan and agrees to wed a cop, only to discover he is after Kalyan, pulling her back into turmoil.

programme.title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
programme.desc: Starring: Raghava Lawrence,Oviya. Raghava, a young man fearful of ghosts, enjoys a happy life with his family until a trip to Coimbatore results in his possession by a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Khoonkhar
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sreenivas,Rakul Preet Singh. Gagan and Sweety fall in love but are forced to break up because her father disapproves of him. While defending a family from thugs one day, Gagan unknowingly saves Sweety and vows to protect her.

programme.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Starring: Vicky Kaushal,Paresh Rawal. After militants attack a base in Uri, Major Vihaan Singh Shergill executes a covert strike across the border to eliminate the perpetrators with tactical precision.

programme.title: Baby John
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Dhawan,Keerthy Suresh. To protect his daughter, Satya Verma vanishes. But danger resurfaces, forcing him to confront Babbar Sher and the ghosts of a life he tried to leave behind.

programme.title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
programme.desc: Starring: Vishal,Regina Cassandra. A cop and soldier unite against cybercriminals, fighting to protect online safety, and navigating digital realms to ensure justice prevails.

programme.title: Bachchhan Paandey
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Kriti Sanon. To succeed, Myra focuses her film on notorious gangster Bachchhan Paandey. The plot thickens when Paandey demands to act in the film, creating chaos and raising stakes for everyone involved.

programme.title: Hum Chaar
programme.desc: Starring: Prit Kamani,Simran Sharma. The film centers on four college friends who took different paths in life but remained inseparable from each other.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Ghost

programme.title: Vijay The Master
programme.desc: Starring: Joseph Vijay,Vijay Sethupathi. An alcoholic professor, unknowingly assigned to a juvenile facility, confronts a ruthless gangster exploiting children as scapegoats for his crimes, sparking a battle for justice.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Karisma Kapoor. A reformed criminal, Babu finds purpose in raising a train crash survivor as his own. But when his past resurfaces, his newfound happiness hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Vivah
programme.desc: Starring: Shahid Kapoor,Amrita Rao. Poonam, a traditional girl gets engaged to Prem. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and Poonam might be scarred for life.

programme.title: Valimai
programme.desc: Starring: Ajith Kumar,Karthikeya. A notorious biker gang pushes the city into lawlessness. Arjun, a brave cop, takes charge, determined to dismantle the gang and restore peace before everything collapses.

programme.title: Butterfly
programme.desc: Starring: Anupama Parameswaran. Geetha battles to rescue her sister's kidnapped children. In her desperate mission, she unearths disturbing truths about her seemingly ordinary neighbours.

programme.title: Pralay The Destroyer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Srinivas Bellamkonda,Pooja Hegde. A baby survives a brutal massacre. Years later, destiny leads him back to the gang that destroyed his family, setting the stage for revenge, justice, and an epic showdown.

programme.title: Sam Bahadur
programme.desc: Starring: Vicky Kaushal,Fatima Sana Shaikh. Sam Manekshaw fought five wars, served four decades, and still had time for iconic one-liners. A hero in boots, he became India's first Field Marshal-with style!

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Katrina Kaif. Amidst the chaos of the India-Pakistan partition, Bharat is tasked with safeguarding his family. He honors his father's wish, becoming their steadfast guardian through a turbulent era.

programme.title: Pataas
programme.desc: Starring: Nandamuri Kalyan Ram,Ashutosh Rana. Kalyan Sinha works with corrupt politician GK until his best friend is killed. The tragedy forces him to confront his choices and fight to reclaim his integrity.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Ileana. Naina leaves wanderer Kalyan and agrees to wed a cop, only to discover he is after Kalyan, pulling her back into turmoil.

programme.title: Jaat
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Randeep Hooda and Regina Cassandra. A stranger's clash with Varadaraja Ranatunga's men in a coastal village exposes the locals' misery and begins a battle for justice.

programme.title: The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Starring: Vijay,Prashanth. Gandhi, a secret agent, loses his family to mission fallout. Years later, he meets a boy like his son, just as new threats emerge.

programme.title: Extra Ordinary Man
programme.desc: Starring: Nithiin,Sreeleela. Abhinay, once lost in artistic struggle, discovers love that redefines his path. A sudden opportunity to act in a movie changes everything, pushing him toward fame and self-discovery.

programme.title: Sikandar
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Rashmika Mandanna. A tragic accident pushes the powerful Sikandar to protect the less fortunate by standing up to corruption and greed - using any means necessary.

programme.title: The Real Tiger
programme.desc: Starring: Mahesh Babu,Samantha Ruth Prabhu. After years, politician Shankar wakes up from a coma. His son, a cop, recreates everything as would be expected by his father in order to save him from any shock. He also hunts for his father's foes.
